<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Checkdomain](https://checkdomain.de/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/checkdomain/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "checkdomain"
  dnsCredentials:
    # CHECKDOMAIN_TOKEN: API token
    token: ""
    # CHECKDOMAIN_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL, defaults to https://api.checkdomain.de
    endpoint: ""
    # CHECKDOMAIN_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 300)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # CHECKDOMAIN_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 7)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # CHECKDOMAIN_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
